metadata.description: HarnessFlow — From idea to shipped product: high-quality engineering workflows for AI agents. Spec-anchored SDD, gated TDD, evidence-based routing, independent reviews, and formal closeout.

plugins.name: harness-flow
plugins.description: HarnessFlow v1.0.0 skill pack: 29 hf-* skills plus using-hf-workflow, covering discovery -> spec -> design -> tasks -> TDD/subagent-driven implementation -> reviews -> browser evidence -> gates -> finalize -> release, with evidence-based routing and Fagan author/reviewer separation. v1.0.0 promotes shared subagent roles to top-level agents/ (hf-implementer uses hf-test-driven-dev; hf-reviewer covers every hf-*review node), moves slash command definitions to top-level commands/, and keeps Claude Code / OpenCode / Cursor support. hf-release remains engineer-level tag readiness only: no deployment, staged rollout, monitoring, rollback, or automatic git tag.
